expo.name: flockora-app
expo.description: Care. Hatch. Breed. Protect. Flockora helps backyard poultry keepers and hobby breeders track birds, flocks, daily care, eggs, feed, and breeding/hatching — all stored privately on this device.

plugins.cameraPermission: Flockora uses your camera to take a photo of your bird so it can suggest breed, sex, color, and life stage details for you to confirm.
plugins.photosPermission: Flockora uses your photo library so you can choose an existing photo of your bird.
